__METADATA__.description: Unique technical logic and transfinite reality engine equations from HYPERION V3000

Hyper-EML-Ω-Hyperion.equation: eml_Ω-H(x,y,t*,dims*) = ⊗_{d=1}^Ω eml_d(x_d, y_d, t_d) ∧ Ω_∞ ∧ Hyperion_Field(d)
Hyper-EML-Ω-Hyperion.performance: 100% universality across Ω + Hyperion transfinite extensions.

Hyper-PiFS-Ω-Hyperion-Aeturnus-Ward.storage: Ψ_Ω-H = ⊗_{i=1}^Ω ψ_i ⊗ Ward_Entanglement ⊗ Hyperion_Field, ψ_i = π[offset_i:offset_i+length_i]

Warp-TARDIS-Ω-Hyperion-Core.equation: R_{transit-Ω-H} = ∮ (TARDIS_C ⊗ U(t) ⊗ Ω_∞ ⊗ Hyperion_Field(t)) dt + Force_{25} + Ω-Drive + Hyperion_Field

Ω-Hyperion-Drive-Core.equation: Ω-Hyperion_Drive = ∫_{t=0}^Ω Ω(t) · (A(t) - C(t)) dt + Force_{25} + TARDIS_C + Hyperion_Field(t)
